header.note: transparent overlay on dark hero video

hero.note: text over full-bleed video; near-white text on dark video

palette.notes: Site uses white background for body/content sections; hero is dark/video-driven; nav is transparent over dark hero, becoming visible on scroll

body.family: "Alliance No.1", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

h1.family: "Alliance No.2", "Alliance No.1", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

paragraph.family: "Alliance No.1", system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, "Fira Sans", "Droid Sans", "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

fonts.notes: Custom typefaces: Alliance No.1 (body/UI) and Alliance No.2 (headings). Both are proprietary/licensed sans-serifs. No web-safe fallback needed — loaded as web fonts.

sections.name: What Makes Palantir Platforms Powerful

cards.title: Day 1 Value
cards.copy: Our platforms deliver value out of the box. Days, not years.

cards.title: AI Decision Advantage Across Your Organization
cards.copy: Bring intelligence to your entire enterprise, and to the core of the decisions and operations that matter most.

cards.title: Full Stack Interoperability
cards.copy: Palantir meets you where you are, automatically connecting with and enhancing your existing data systems.

cards.title: Multi-Layered Security and Data Privacy
cards.copy: Our approach to security enables collaboration instead of inhibiting it. With founding roots in intel and defense, Palantir carries certifications or attestations of compliance for the most stringent standards, including FedRamp, IL5, and more.

sections.gist: 4-card value proposition grid: speed to value, AI advantage, interoperability, security

sections.name: Homepage: Get Started Now
sections.subheading: Now in over 50 sectors and industries worldwide.
sections.gist: Bottom CTA section with demo request and sector count proof point

newsItems.headline: Alex Karp talks US software dominance, DOGE, and his book The Technological Republic
newsItems.description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp spoke about his new book The Technological Republic, the state of Western tech institutions, and DOGE on CNBC Squawk Box.

newsItems.headline: Palantir's AI-fueled TITAN trucks are rolling into U.S. Army hands
newsItems.description: The U.S. Army now has in hand a few Tactical Intelligence Targeting Access Nodes, state-of-the-art trucks that promise to streamline the battlefield process of spotting, tracking and blasting.

imagery.note: 6 total videos: 1 hero reel + 5 per-platform demo videos. All autoplay, muted, loop.

animLib: none — CSS transitions + IntersectionObserver + HTML5 autoplay video
animNotes: No third-party animation library detected (no gsap/anime/framer/lottie/etc on window or in script URLs). Animation achieved via: (1) full-bleed looping video in hero; (2) per-platform looping demo videos in platforms section; (3) CSS `transition: all` on headings; (4) IntersectionObserver (native) for scroll-triggered reveals. Stack: Next.js (React SSR), Contentful CMS (__NEXT_DATA__), GTM, OneTrust cookies.

navigation.style: transparent overlay on hero, white text; utility nav with Contact + Get Started CTAs

designObservations.colorScheme: Primarily light (white body) with dark hero. Monochromatic near-black (#1e2124) primary text. Hero text rgb(239,239,239) on dark video.
designObservations.typography: Alliance No.1 + Alliance No.2 — proprietary sans-serif typefaces. H1 at 80px. Body 18px. Strong typographic hierarchy.
designObservations.heroPattern: Full-viewport video reel background, single large H1, minimal copy, one CTA. 'Scroll to Explore' indicator.
designObservations.layoutPattern: Full-bleed sections. Video-first product showcase (tab per product). News ticker / latest impact grid. Social proof via analyst rankings. Value prop card grid. Final CTA.
designObservations.toneVoice: Bold, declarative, government/enterprise authority. American manufacturing + defense framing ('American Sea Power', 'American Re-Industrialization', 'American AI Infrastructure'). Technical credibility via analyst rankings.
uniqueElements: Full-bleed autoplay video hero (no canvas, no WebGL)
Heavy editorial news section (CNBC, Axios bylines)
'Latest Impact' stories grid with military/enterprise use cases
Analyst ranking social proof (Dresner, IDC, Forrester)
No founder profiles, no team section
Transparent nav that overlays hero video
